description:
Parent epic: V3 E3: Context and typed results

Source task 5/8 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Decide whether public docs should say `result` while internal modules still
  use `output`, or whether code should rename to match the DSL.

Epic closure criteria:
- new users can pass a naked map first and add schema later
- typed results are stable enough for app code
- context/result docs avoid conflating state, memory, and output

comments.text: Decided public DSL/docs should say result while retaining Jidoka.Output as the implementation boundary for raw provider/model output. Updated docs and private codegen naming to reinforce that split.

title: E3: Decide whether public docs should say result while internal modules still use o...
